product.name: Ari Penye

product.familyDescriptorEn: UV-resistant AriPam fibre fabrics and knits

product.specLine: 140 g/m², 100% AriPam, Uv protective, Jersey Knit Fabric

Ari Penye can also be used on promotional t-shirts.
